content: Hello! I have a question about the line 94168 of the EN Source Sheet (short key is "aIqo"). I see that both the Manual and AI translation is "Special Awakener." In the previous Sheet, it was translated as "Limited Awakener" so I feel like this is maybe a mistake? The AI translation was pasted into the Manual? <:jenkin_processing:1408324289115062333> (AI translation of "Standard Awakener" from the line right above is "Permanent Awakener" for example)
